query:
SELECT id, name, instagram, image, categoryId 
FROM establishments 
WHERE instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT id, name, instagram, image, categoryId 
FROM establishments 
WHERE instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' 
LIMIT 10;
